violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of the base of the potato slicer. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment shall register a food safety certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection (RI license). New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2025

The ware-washing area in the old kitchen is lacking a hand-washing sink. Hand-washing sink shall be installed. -Per interview of PIC, a hand-washing sink has been purchased; The establishment has to schedule installation of sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Fish packed in ROP packaging was observed thawing in intact package. Fish packed in ROP must be taken out of package before defrosting. Fish was 36DF. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025
The ice machine and potato box were in poor repair was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment shall register a food safety certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection (RI license). -Application provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The ware-washing area in the old kitchen is lacking a hand-washing sink. Hand-washing sink shall be installed. -Per interview of PIC, a hand-washing sink has been purchased; The establishment has to schedule installation of sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) observed with food residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the can opener during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package in the back storage area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

The sinks used for food preparation in the old kitchen and new kitchen are lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
